top_signals.title: Warsh Vows to Deliver Price Stability, Fed ‘Regime Change’
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh said policymakers at the central bank have no tolerance for high inflation, reiterating a vow to tame price growth that has been elevated for five years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US sanctions VPN, malware providers for enabling ransomware attacks
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctioned two individuals and one entity for enabling ransomware attacks against U.S. organizations. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Paramount still plans to close WBD merger by end of September despite lawsuit
top_signals.summary: Paramount is still planning for its acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery to close by late September despite lawsuit challenge from state attorneys general.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says US to abandon proposed Strait of Hormuz cargo fee
top_signals.summary: US president says he will ‘replace’ plan with investment into the US from Gulf states
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Honduras Launches Bond Buyback, Looks to Sell New Global Debt
top_signals.summary: Honduras is looking to buy back bonds and tap global markets for the first time since 2024, joining this year’s borrowing spree in emerging markets.

top_signals.title: Ann Widdecombe killed in ‘targeted attack’, counterterror police say
top_signals.summary: Ex-Conservative minister and Reform spokesperson was found dead at her home in Devon on Thursday

top_signals.title: China’s Crude Imports Plunge to Lowest in Nearly a Decade - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: China’s Crude Imports Plunge to Lowest in Nearly a Decade  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: England v Argentina: Bellingham bounce attracts more bets than Messi to score
top_signals.summary: Jude Bellingham’s emergence as England’s World Cup hero has seen him backed by more punters than Lionel Messi to score in Wednesday’s semi-final with Argentina. Data from Sportradar, which processes betting tickets for 250 gambling firms worldwide, reveals that Bellingham has accounted for more than half (52 per cent) of wagers in the goalscorer market.  [...]
